title: Sengoku Jidai - bushy leaves remover (increases FPS)
description: Gets rid of bushy leaves in Sengoku Jidai mod (around 100% FPS improvement)
body:
This resourcepack simply removes bushy leaves from Sengoku Jidai mod, giving around 100% FPS improvement in some scenarions. Ideal specially for weaker hardware.

Here's a before and after comparison (FPS at the top right):

BEFORE (38fps):
![Description image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NtbUm1Ni/images/082d095d64b83a0e05599d738f9fb2bc55d8aa32.png)

AFTER (80fps):
![Description image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NtbUm1Ni/images/18c81261107de6710a30825be490549e32908f14.png)
